title: FNaF HUD/GUI Pack
description: a simple resource pack that retextures the hud/gui into a fnaf styled one including certain items and blocks
body:
FNAF GUI/HUD Resource Pack
a simple resource pack for fnaf related modpacks that retextures the hud, blocks, and items
Retextures
-Advancement menu

-Hotbar

-Totem

-Health

-Armor

-Hunger

-Bubbles

-Cake

-Eye of Ender

-Menu Background

-Recipe Book

-Title

-Gamemode Switcher

-A few paintings to have funny images

-Has support for appleskin by squeek502
